name: hire-adda-monorepo
description: Hire Adda - A specialized job portal for blue-collar workers.

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" --kill-others
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: npx -y concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" --kill-others
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.clean: npx -y rimraf node_modules coverage backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/dist frontend/.next

author: Hire Adda Team
